_publications._publicationTitle: Gene signature associated with benign neurofibroma transformation to malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: In the top two positions was Entinostat MS-275, a histone deacetylase (HDAC) inhibitor...The non-specific HDAC inhibitor Trichostatin A (TSA) appeared in 39 of the top 50 entries retrieved
details: Successfully identified therapeutic drug candidates with pval <0.005, retrieving HDAC inhibitors including Entinostat MS-275 in top positions and TSA in 39 of top 50 entries
